message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="All tasks complete — shutting down">
All 3 tasks are complete and pushed. Great work, team! Shutting down the session now. Thank you all for your reviews and collaboration.
</teammate-message>

content.text: Great session. The landing page ended up solid -- clear hierarchy, consistent center-axis, proper token usage. And the DoD updates around dead-end pages and full user journeys will keep us honest going forward. Good work, everyone.

input.content: Thanks, good session. All three tasks are clean from a visual design standpoint. The landing page has proper hierarchy, the e2e tests validate our design affordances, and the DoD updates codify the "no dead-end pages" principle that caught the original problem. Ready to shut down.
input.summary: Session wrap-up, ready to shut down

routing.summary: Session wrap-up, ready to shut down
routing.content: Thanks, good session. All three tasks are clean from a visual design standpoint. The landing page has proper hierarchy, the e2e tests validate our design affordances, and the DoD updates codify the "no dead-end pages" principle that caught the original problem. Ready to shut down.

content.text: All three tasks are complete. I've sent my wrap-up to the team lead and I'm ready to shut down whenever the coordinator sends the shutdown request.
